data.content: Fixed alias/aliases field mismatch: kno CLI returns alias (singular string|null) but code read aliases (plural string[]). Added collectAliases() helper in knots-backend.ts that merges both forms. Updated KnotRecord to include alias field. Fixed all consumers: toBeat, buildBeatsForRepo aliasToId map, loadAliases for deps, and dependency enrichment. Added parentFromHierarchicalAlias for alias-based parent inference. Added test for alias-based parent derivation with singular alias field matching real CLI output. All 1995 tests pass, lint/typecheck/build clean.
